title: Vežba 94

questions.text: Mradi umekuwa mgumu kiasi gani hadi sasa, kulingana na Sarah?

answers.answer: Mradi umekuwa mgumu sana bila maendeleo yoyote.
answers.feedback: Sarah anazungumzia ugumu, lakini pia anataja maendeleo.

answers.answer: Projekat je bio lak i bez ikakvih izazova.
answers.feedback: Sarah kaže da imaju neke izazove u projektu.

answers.answer: Mradi umekuwa na changamoto chache, lakini maendeleo yanafanyika.

dialogue.text: Everything is progressing, but we have a few challenges.

instructions: Slušaj audio snimak i odgovori na pitanje koje je navedeno ispod.
explanation:
A few hutumika kama kihimarisha kuonyesha idadi ndogo ya vitu. Hii inaashiria kwamba kitu kipo, lakini si kwa wingi mkubwa. Kwa kawaida hutumika kwa idadi ndogo ya nomino zinazohesabika. Kwa mfano:

We encountered a few problems during the meeting, but we solved them quickly. – Hii ina maana kwamba kulikuwa na matatizo machache, lakini yalidhibitiwa.
